growth_records.medium: sterile (0.2 µm filtered, microwave-sterilized) Pond-1 water
growth_records.cite: Hahn et al. Complete ecological isolation and cryptic diversity in Polynucleobacter bacteria not resolved by 16S rRNA gene sequences. The ISME Journal (2016). DOI:10.1038/ismej.2015.237. [PMC4913878]
growth_records.snippet: Batch culture experiments with strain QLW-P1DMWA-1 in sterile water from Pond-1 (home environment) determined a doubling time of 4.3 h (data not shown).
growth_records.notes: Doubling time (4.3 h) explicitly reported in text (Discussion, 'data not shown' for the raw curve). growth_rate_per_h = ln2/4.3 = 0.1611 h-1 (calculated). Temperature (15°C) and pH (sterilized Pond-1 water increased from pH 5.0 to 6.3-6.6 upon sterilization, per Results) are inferred from the paper's home-and-away transplantation experiment methods, which used the same strain/home-water system incubated at 15°C in the dark without agitation; the specific batch experiment giving 4.3 h is not separately described with its own methods (marked 'data not shown'), hence medium confidence.
